# InspiraLabs (PT Nawa Inspira Digital)

> Software house Indonesia untuk UMKM, sekolah, dan pemerintah desa. Jasa pembuatan website, aplikasi, IoT, desain visual, dan pelatihan teknologi.

## About

InspiraLabs is an Indonesian software house providing custom software development, IoT solutions, visual branding, and hands-on technology training. Founded by young Indonesian tech professionals with global-standard engineering skills and an educational approach. We serve SMEs (UMKM), schools, village governments, and enterprises.

## Services

- Software Development (web apps, mobile, dashboards, AI chatbots, CRM): https://inspiralabs.id/#layanan-software
- Robotic & IoT Solutions (sensors, EWS, smart systems, embedded): https://inspiralabs.id/#layanan-iot
- Creative & Visual Branding (logo, UI/UX, social media assets): https://inspiralabs.id/#layanan-design
- Tech Training & Consulting (coding, Roblox, IoT, AI, design workshops): https://inspiralabs.id/#layanan-workshop

## Products (Ready to Deploy)

- SiJagaAir: IoT-based flood early warning system with WhatsApp alerts
- Sistem Informasi Desa Terpadu: village administration platform
- LMS: e-learning platform for schools and training centers
- Smart POS: point-of-sale with real-time inventory analytics
- Sistem Manajemen Ekosistem Masjid: mosque community management

All products: https://inspiralabs.id/#etalase

## Pricing

Two models available:
- Direct Purchase (Beli Putus): full ownership, one-time payment, starting below Rp 10 million
- SaaS Subscription (Berlangganan): low upfront, monthly/annual, includes updates and support

Enterprise and custom projects: Rp 50 million+
Details: https://inspiralabs.id/#harga

## Target Audience

- UMKM (Indonesian SMEs) seeking digital transformation
- Schools and educational institutions needing e-learning or workshops
- Village governments (pemerintah desa) requiring administration systems
- Enterprises needing custom software or IoT solutions
- Students and academics seeking project consultation or mentoring

## Contact

- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/6282124533265 (response within 1x24 working hours)
- Email: hello@inspiralabs.id
- Contact form: https://inspiralabs.id/kontak
- Needs assessment survey: https://inspiralabs.id/survey

## Case Studies

- SiJagaAir flood EWS for Desa Bojong Kulur, Bogor
- E-Portfolio Seni digital platform for Labschool Cibubur
- IoT & Hardware workshop for SDIT Kota Depok
- ECC Master Dash operational monitoring for enterprise
- Kasly personal finance mobile app

Portfolio: https://inspiralabs.id/#portofolio

## Location

Based in Bogor, West Java, Indonesia. Serving clients nationwide with online consultation available outside business hours.

- Privacy Policy: https://inspiralabs.id/privasi
